notes: Phase F expanded scope from 5 to 8 files. The five pure helpers
still score 100%. The three newly-added NestJS services score
individually ~84-87% because Prisma-mocked unit tests can't always
discriminate every ObjectLiteral mutant on Prisma query argument
objects (the runtime never sees the mutated shape with the test
double in place — those gaps are closed end-to-end by the
Playwright API suite, not by unit assertions).
Total: 87.78% measured. We commit minScore=82 — five points of
honest headroom per the phase F rule (gate = floor(score - 5)).
To raise the floor: run `pnpm mutate`, confirm the new score, bump
this file in the same PR. To lower it: explain why in the PR body.
